title: Relbunium corymbosum
taxonomy: Relbunium corymbosum is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Relbunium, which is a group of plants native to Australia. The plant is also known as the pink bugle flower due to its showy pink flowers. Relbunium corymbosum is an evergreen shrub that produces clusters of small flowers on its branches. As a member of the Apocynaceae family, Relbunium corymbosum is closely related to other plants such as the common milkweed and the oleander.
